ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tool was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tool was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* User who created the tool */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the tool */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the tool is active or not */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool being tested */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment used */,
  "test_config" TEXT /* Test configuration used for the run */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test run */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date and time the test run was executed */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test run */,
  "test_case_count" INTEGER /* Number of test cases in the test run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES tools ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Overall status of the test result */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message associated with the test result */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test result */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test result */,
  "successes" INTEGER /* Number of successful test cases */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of failed test cases */,
  "crashes" INTEGER /* Number of test cases that crashed */,
  "timeouts" INTEGER /* Number of test cases that timed out */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the test run */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the test run */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage during the test run */,
  "rss" INTEGER /* Resident set size (RSS) during the test run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run */,
  "case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "case_description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "case_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case */,
  "case_tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the test case */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., success, failure, crash, timeout) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test case */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test case */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the test case in seconds */,
  "output" TEXT /* Output of the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system used in the test environment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "hardware_spec" TEXT /* Hardware specifications of the test environment */,
  "env_owner" INTEGER /* User who created the test environment */,
  "env_last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the test environment */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the test environment is the default */,
  "env_tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the test environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the performance metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the performance metric */,
  "collected_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "log_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log entry */,
  "log_component" TEXT /* Component that generated the log entry */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the test run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the test result */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_access_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test version */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the test configuration */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the test version */,
  "version_tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the test version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)
